View on GitHub
Arc L1 Blockchain · x402 Protocol

Research markets.
Pay only when
it matters.

PolyArc is an autonomous AI agent that reads live Polymarket prediction markets, searches free sources first, and pays for premium analysis only when the insight is worth the cost.

View on GitHub See how it works
Live on Arc Testnet · $0.05 per premium analysis via x402
How it works

Free first.
Pay only when needed.

The agent makes a cost-vs-value decision on every query. No human approves individual payments.

01

You type a market question

Ask anything — "Will Bitcoin hit $200k?", "Who wins the 2026 midterms?" — or pick from suggested topics.

Free
02

Agent fetches live Polymarket odds

PolyArc pulls the current prediction market odds for your question in real time via the Polymarket public API.

Free
03

Searches free sources first

Wikipedia, DuckDuckGo, and Google News are checked before spending anything. If the free data is good enough, the agent stops and writes a report.

Free
04

Decides: is premium data worth it?

The agent scores the confidence of free research. If there's an information gap, it triggers a premium payment. If not, it saves your budget.

AI decision
05

Autonomously pays $0.05 USDC via x402

No human click required. The agent signs a USDC payment on Arc Testnet — the payment is the authentication. GPT-4o returns the deep analysis.

x402 payment · Arc Testnet
06

You get a full research report

Current odds, research summary, whether the market looks mispriced, total cost, and a Payment Trace showing every on-chain transaction.

Report delivered
Features

What makes it different

🧠

Cost-vs-value decision engine

Evaluates every query autonomously. Decides whether premium data is worth paying for. Most queries never trigger a payment.

⚡

Autonomous x402 payments

No human approves individual transactions. The agent holds USDC and pays via x402 the same way your browser loads a webpage.

📊

Live Polymarket odds

Real-time prediction market data from Polymarket's public API. See exactly what the market thinks before the agent weighs in.

💰

Hard budget cap

$0.10 USDC per session, enforced server-side. The agent cannot overspend — ever. Budget resets each session.

🧾

Full payment trace

Every on-chain payment is logged: timestamp, amount, which resource was purchased, and the agent's reasoning for paying.

🔒

Testnet safe

All USDC is test currency on Arc Testnet. No real money at risk. API keys stored in environment variables, never in code.

Honesty table

What's actually live today

This table is kept current. Trust it over any pitch deck or demo video.

Live Polymarket odds fetching✅ Live
Free source research (Wikipedia, DuckDuckGo, Google News)✅ Live
Autonomous x402 payment for premium GPT-4o analysis✅ Live
$0.10 session budget with real-time tracker✅ Live
Payment Trace tab with on-chain history✅ Live
Cost-vs-value decision engine (pay or skip)✅ Live
One-click suggested market topics✅ Live
Multi-market comparison in one session🛠 In progress
Portfolio tracker for Polymarket positions❌ Not built yet
Mainnet USDC (real money)❌ Testnet only
Tech stack

Built on

Blockchain
Arc Testnet — Circle's stablecoin L1
Payments
x402 protocol · Circle Gateway · USDC
AI
OpenAI GPT-4o · GPT-4o mini
Market data
Polymarket public API
Free research
Wikipedia · DuckDuckGo · Google News
Backend
Node.js · TypeScript · Express

Ready to see it work?

Working testnet demo. Not slides. Try it yourself.
